section_content.Summary: A clarification is needed on whether the Q4 NRR value should include one-time adjustments.
section_content.Current Understanding: The existing evidence is incomplete and should remain unresolved.
section_content.Question: Should one-time adjustments be included in the Q4 NRR calculation?
Conflicting Evidence: The revenue note reports 118% NRR for enterprise accounts.
The monthly close report has not yet been reconciled with the raw source note.
section_content.Why Unresolved: The current evidence does not establish an approved treatment for one-time adjustments.
Required Review: Confirm the approved treatment with the revenue owner.
Update the metric and source-note pages after review.
